title: Bestway Flowclear Type II Filter Cartridge, Swimming Pool and Spa Filter, Easy installation, Pool Cleaning Filter, Pack of 2
features: REPLACEMENT FILTER CARTRIDGE: Perfect for your Bestway pool or Lay-Z-Spa hot tub, the filter is replacement for 2,006-3,028 L (530-800 gal)
EASY TO CLEAN: Simple to install and replace, meaning your pool or hot tub can be in constant use
KEEP POOL WATER HEALTHY: Filters help take the stress out of cleaning your pool, replace cartridges every 2-3 weeks For optimal performance
FILTERS OUT DIRT AND GRIME: Dirt can be built up quickly, the filter keeps out the unwanted debris from your pool
DIMENSIONS: 4.2 Inch x 5.4 Inch/10.6 cm x 13.6 cm
description: From the manufacturer Bestway Filter Cartridges Keep your Lay-Z Spa or Pool clean and healthy The Bestway Filter Cartridges are essential for Lay-Z-Spa and above ground pool pumps as they filter out dirt and grime from the water to help keep it clean and healthy. How do they work? They work by catching dirt and grime when the water is pumped through them. As your pump will usually be continuously cleaning and filtering the water when it is turned on, this dirt can quickly build up, especially when the hot tub/pool is regularly used. To find out which filter cartridge is compatible with your pool or spa, please refer to your pump manual.
